mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate over the prior quarter lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, so S&P 500 prices rise over the next month when the policy rate is in a clear downtrend.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are not positive in the majority of months with a declining FEDFUNDS trend, or if rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening household income and demand, which reduces earnings expectations and pushes S&P 500 returns lower over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not show negative median 20d returns, or if positive 20d returns occur in more than 60% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both rise together, retail spending is supported by job growth, implying stronger near-term revenue growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-PAYEMS signal does not outperform each single-series effect, or if the combined-signal Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL acceleration above the Federal Reserve's tolerance forces tighter expected policy and higher real rates, which compress equity valuations and lower S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-triggered episodes produce positive 20d SPX returns in a majority of cases, or if the interaction term adds no explanatory power relative to CPIAUCSL alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in INDPRO indicates improving industrial supply conditions and faster cyclical activity, which supports earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if quarter-ahead SPX returns are not higher when INDPRO trends upward, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC remains below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in HOUST from prior months signals weakening housing demand and a broader slowdown in rate-sensitive spending, which should lower S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if downside housing-triggered episodes do not have negative median 20d returns, or if the signal becomes positive after controlling for FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth slows while UNRATE rises, labor income momentum deteriorates and consumer demand weakens, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE deterioration does not outperform either series alone, or if positive 20d returns dominate during the joint-signal periods.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery, rising GDPC1 combined with stable or improving RSAFS indicates resilient final demand and supports a positive S&P 500 drift over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined GDP-sales recovery signal fails to produce positive quarter-ahead returns above baseline, or if its rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.
